name: smart-school-manager
description: Smart School Manager full-stack web application for Hostinger Node.js hosting.

scripts.install:all: npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix frontend install --include=dev && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.postinstall: npm --prefix frontend install --include=dev && npm --prefix frontend run build
